title: Theophrasta spathulata
taxonomy: Theophrasta spathulata is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The genus Theophrasta is part of the order Gentianales. Theophrasta spathulata is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of Nigeria and Ghana. Its classification also places it within the tribe Psychotrieae. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Theophrasta spathulata.
uses: Theophrasta spathulata is a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant's roots and leaves are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
